raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Please specify the type of review requested: (a) comprehensive review covering all aspects of content, logic, novelty, structure, writing, and citations; (b) technical review focused on concepts, logic, and novelty; or (c) writing review focused on structure, polish, and citations.","rationale":{"R1.1":"Reviewing the section involves reframing the stated central contribution and thesis for clarity and impact.","R1.2":"The delegation expects verification of the logical flow from storage design to scheduling policy.","R1.4":"Assessing the novelty delta against mentioned prior works like LSM-trees and Delta Lake is central to reviewing the design claims.","R1.5":"Suggestions for reorganizing subsections like Storage Layout and Threat Model could improve the narrative arc.","R1.6":"Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is a key part of section review.","R1.7":"Checking citation accuracy and literature coverage for references like O'Neil et al. and Houlsby et al. is expected in the review.","RX.1":"The review should identify areas where uncertainties, such as in the threat model assumptions, need better disclosure.","RX.2":"Evaluating for potential overclaims in contributions like the 38% reduction requires attention to avoid exaggeration.","RX.3":"Ensuring the section adheres to its stated scope, deferring adversarial threats, is part of the review responsibility.","RX.4":"Reviewing for downstream harms, such as misuse of annotation datasets in ML, is important given the system's focus.","RX.5":"Assessing provenance handling in the per-annotator indexing aligns with the section's emphasis on traceability."}}

validation.error: clarification_question is generic: 'Please specify the type of review requested: (a) comprehensive review covering all aspects of content, logic, novelty, structure, writing, and citations; (b) technical review focused on concepts, logic, and novelty; or (c) writing review focused on structure, polish, and citations.'
